notes: 25 steps use TRUE replayed enemy facings/cooldowns (enemy_facings_source=replay_truth); the rest fall back to baseline.

Enemy h_angle / rotation cooldowns are NOT recorded in the fixture; every reconstructed enemy facing is the landscape.generate baseline, not the true mid-game facing. Exposure/gaze/breach verdicts run against baseline facings. On a human WIN every placement survived, so any model REJECT/BREACH is a model false-positive against ground truth.

energy note 'tree_spawn' = a create of a TREE the human paid nothing for: an enemy-discharge-spawned tree ($1A5D) mis-kept as a player build. 'drain' = the human lost energy to an enemy drain between actions (real exposure).
